# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for a complete GCP application stack (Compute Engine, Cloud SQL, Cloud Storage, Load Balancer). Focus on core infrastructure. Skip Cloud Logging and Monitoring configuration to reduce complexity in our initial MVP deployment.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

resources:
  - name: vpc-network
    type: google::vpc
    properties:
      project: $(config.project_id)
      network: my-vpc
      routingMode: GLOBAL

  - name: subnetwork-1
    type: google::compute/subnetwork
    properties:
      project: $(config.project_id)
      region: us-central1
      network: my-vpc
      name: subnet-1
      ipCidrRange: 10.0.1.0/24

  - name: instances
    type: google::compute/instance
    properties:
      project: $(config.project_id)
      region: us-central1
      zone: us-central1-a
      instanceTemplate: ${REFERENCE_INSTANCE_TEMPLATE}
      name: my-instance-1
      count: 2
      serviceAccount: projects/$(config.project_id)/serviceAccounts/default
      tags:
        - my-app
      networkInterface0:
        network: $(REF_VPC)
        subnetwork: $(REF_SUBNET)
        accessConfigName: AccessConfig1

  - name: firewall-rule-allow-default
    type: google::compute/firewall
    properties:
      project: $(config.project_id)
      network: my-vpc
      direction: INGRESS
      priority: 1000
      targetTags:
        - my-app
      sourceRanges: 0.0.0.0/0
      allowed: ALL

  - name: instance-template
    type: google::compute/instanceTemplate
    properties:
      project: $(config.project_id)
      region: us-central1
      machineType: zones/us-central1-a/machineTypes/n1-standard-1
      disks:
        - autoDetect: true
          boot: true
      metadata:
        items:
          - key: startup-script
            value: |
              #!/bin/bash
              sudo apt-get update
              sudo apt-get install -y apache2
              sudo systemctl start apache2
      networkInterfaces:
        - network: global
          subnetwork: $(REF_SUBNET)
          accessConfigs:
            - name: AccessConfig1
              type: ONE_TO_ONE_NAT

  - name: cloud-sql-instance
    type: google::sql-database
    properties:
      projectId: $(config.project_id)
      region: us-central1
      databaseName: mydb
      instanceId: mysqlinstance
      rootPassword: secret-password
      sizeTier: db-nano

  - name: cloud-sql-forwarding-rule
    type: google::sql-database/sqlForwardingRule
    properties:
      projectId: $(config.project_id)
      region: us-central1
      instance: ${REFERENCE_INSTANCE}
      name: my-cloud-sql-forwarding-rule

  - name: cloud-sql-instance-endpoint
    type: google::sql-database/instanceEndpoint
    properties:
      projectId: $(config.project_id)
      region: us-central1
      instance: ${REFERENCE_INSTANCE}
      rootPassword: secret-password
      name: my-cloud-sql-endpoint

  - name: external-http-load-balancer
    type: google::compute/region-loadbalancer
    properties:
      project: $(config.project_id)
      region: us-central1
      name: my-external-http-lb
      targetPoolName: ${REFERENCE_TARGET_POOL}
      useClientIp: True
      portName: http

  - name: backend-service
    type: google::compute/backendService
    properties:
      project: $(config.project_id)
      region: us-central1
      name: my-backend-service
      loadBalancer: ${REFERENCE_EXTERNAL_LOADBALANCER}
      protocol: HTTP
      healthChecks: ${REFERENCE_HEALTH_CHECKS}
      sessionAffinityConfig: NO_SESSION_AFFINITY

  - name: target-pool
    type: google::compute/targetPool
    properties:
      project: $(config.project_id)
      region: us-central1
      name: ${REFERENCE_TARGET_POOL}
      targetMaxBytes: 81920
      healthChecks: ${REFERENCE_HEALTH_CHECKS}
      targets:
        - $(REFERENCE_INSTANCE_IP): 80
